channel.title: Doctor Mike Diamonds :: Relearn Everything
channel.description: Summary yang di buat dari channel Doctor Mike Diamonds

item.title: 5 Easy Steps To Get To 12% Body Fat (At Any Age)
item.description: Summary from Doctor Mike Diamonds video titled 5 Easy Steps To Get To 12% Body Fat (At Any Age) 5 Golden Rule Walking Start slowly at 8000 steps Increase gradually to 15000 steps Recommended app Pedometer++ Proteios (Protein) Recommended 1 g per 1 pound (lbs) of body weight Rough estimation = 1 palm sized Chicken or steak = 25 g of protein 2 6 8 10 = 50 g of protein (ounce = 28.35 g) 2 Scoop of protein powder 6 oz of Chicken breast = 170.1 g 8 oz of beef = 226.8 g 10 oz of white fish = 283.5 g Elixir of life Train with good form Intermitten Fasting fasting to reset your metabolism Sleep At least sleep 7 hours Sleepng routine 10 3 2 1: 10 Hours before bed no more caffeine 3 Hours before bed no more food 2 Hours before bed no more drink 1 Hour before bed no blue light
